---
title: "Simulation Study — AR(1)"
author: "Akshaan Murugesu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.height = 4, fig.width = 6)
```

```{r libraries}
library(parallel)
library(pracma)

ncores <- max(1, detectCores() - 1)
```

```{r source}
source(here::here("R", "01_core_estimators.R"))
source(here::here("R", "02_dgm.R"))
source(here::here("R", "03_drivers.R"))
source(here::here("R", "04_summary_tables.R"))
```

## Simulation design

```{r params}
set.seed(2025)

nsim        <- 1000
phi_true    <- 0.4
n_values    <- c(50, 75, 100, 200, 300)
alpha_grid  <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.05)
innovations <- c("gaussian", "t5", "chisq5", "exp1")
dir.create(here::here("outputs"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
rds_file    <- here::here("outputs", "results_hybrid_study_ar1.rds")
```

```{r run-or-load}
if (file.exists(rds_file)) {
  results_all <- readRDS(rds_file)
  message("Loaded cached results from ", rds_file)
} else {
  results_all <- setNames(vector("list", length(innovations)), innovations)
  for (innov in innovations) {
    results_all[[innov]] <- list()
    for (n in n_values) {
      cat("AR(1) |", innov, "| n =", n, "\n")
      results_all[[innov]][[as.character(n)]] <- run_hybrid_grid_ar1(
        n = n, nsim = nsim, phi_true = phi_true,
        alpha_grid = alpha_grid, innov = innov, ncores = ncores
      )
    }
  }
  saveRDS(results_all, rds_file)
  message("Results saved to ", rds_file)
}
```

## Plotting helpers

```{r helpers}
pretty_innov_expr <- function(innov) {
  switch(innov,
    gaussian = quote(N(0,1)), t5 = quote(t[5]),
    chisq5   = quote(chi^2[5]), exp1 = quote(Exp(1)),
    as.name(innov))
}
add_headroom <- function(ylim, pct = 0.05) {
  ylim[2] <- ylim[2] + pct * diff(ylim); ylim
}
eps <- 1e-8
```

## Functional boxplots, error curves, and estimator distributions

```{r plots, fig.height=4, fig.width=6}
par(cex.main = 0.95)

for (innov in names(results_all)) {
  for (n in n_values) {

    res        <- results_all[[innov]][[as.character(n)]]
    hybrid_mat <- res$hybrid
    whittle    <- res$whittle
    fdel       <- res$fdel
    innov_lab  <- pretty_innov_expr(innov)

    ## ---- Functional boxplot ------------------------------------------------
    sq   <- apply(hybrid_mat, 2, quantile, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
    q25  <- sq[1, ]; q50 <- sq[2, ]; q75 <- sq[3, ]
    ylim <- range(q25, q75, phi_true, na.rm = TRUE)

    plot(alpha_grid, q50, type = "n",
         ylim = ylim,
         xlim = c(min(alpha_grid) - 0.02, max(alpha_grid) + 0.02),
         xlab = expression(alpha), ylab = expression(hat(phi)),
         main = bquote("Hybrid estimator across" ~ alpha ~ "for AR(1)" * "\n" *
                       T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)))
    grid(col = "grey90", lty = "dotted")
    polygon(c(alpha_grid, rev(alpha_grid)), c(q25, rev(q75)),
            col = adjustcolor("lightblue", 0.5), border = NA)
    lines(alpha_grid, q25, col = "blue", lwd = 1.5, lty = 2)
    lines(alpha_grid, q75, col = "blue", lwd = 1.5, lty = 2)
    lines(alpha_grid, q50, col = "blue", lwd = 2)
    abline(h = phi_true, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
    legend("topleft",
           legend = c("Median", "25–75% band", expression(phi[true])),
           lty = c(1, NA, 2), lwd = c(2, NA, 2),
           pch = c(NA, 15, NA), pt.cex = c(NA, 2, NA),
           col = c("blue", adjustcolor("lightblue", 0.5), "red"), bty = "n")

    ## ---- Bias / SD / RMSE curves -------------------------------------------
    bias_alpha <- colMeans(hybrid_mat, na.rm = TRUE) - phi_true
    sd_alpha   <- apply(hybrid_mat, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
    rmse_alpha <- apply(hybrid_mat, 2, rmse, true = phi_true)

    interior   <- alpha_grid > 0 & alpha_grid < 1
    idx_best   <- which(interior)[which.min(rmse_alpha[interior])]
    alpha_best <- alpha_grid[idx_best]
    hyb_best   <- hybrid_mat[, idx_best]

    for (yval in list(
      list(y = bias_alpha, lab = "Bias",
           title = bquote("Bias as a function of" ~ alpha ~ "for AR(1)" * "\n" *
                          T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab))),
      list(y = sd_alpha,   lab = "SD",
           title = bquote("Standard deviation as a function of" ~ alpha * "\n" *
                          "for AR(1)," ~ T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab))),
      list(y = rmse_alpha, lab = "RMSE",
           title = bquote("RMSE as a function of" ~ alpha ~ "for AR(1)" * "\n" *
                          T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)))
    )) {
      plot(alpha_grid, yval$y, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "blue",
           xlab = expression(alpha), ylab = yval$lab,
           ylim = add_headroom(range(yval$y, na.rm = TRUE)),
           main = yval$title)
      grid(col = "grey90", lty = "dotted")
      points(0, yval$y[alpha_grid == 0], pch = 19, col = "darkgreen")
      points(1, yval$y[alpha_grid == 1], pch = 19, col = "purple")
      text(0, yval$y[alpha_grid == 0], "FDEL",   pos = 3, cex = 0.7, xpd = NA)
      text(1, yval$y[alpha_grid == 1], "Whittle", pos = 3, cex = 0.7, xpd = NA)
      if (yval$lab == "RMSE") {
        abline(v = alpha_best, col = "red", lty = 2)
        text(alpha_best, min(rmse_alpha, na.rm = TRUE),
             labels = bquote(alpha["best"] == .(alpha_best)),
             pos = 4, cex = 0.7)
      }
    }

    ## ---- Zoomed log-scale plots (alpha >= 0.05) ----------------------------
    idx_zoom   <- alpha_grid >= 0.05
    alpha_zoom <- alpha_grid[idx_zoom]
    for (yval in list(
      list(y = abs(bias_alpha[idx_zoom]) + eps, lab = "|Bias| (log scale)",
           title = bquote("|Bias| vs" ~ alpha ~ "(zoom," * alpha >= 0.05 * ")" * "\n" *
                          "AR(1)," ~ T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab))),
      list(y = sd_alpha[idx_zoom] + eps, lab = "SD (log scale)",
           title = bquote("SD vs" ~ alpha ~ "(zoom," * alpha >= 0.05 * ")" * "\n" *
                          "AR(1)," ~ T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab))),
      list(y = rmse_alpha[idx_zoom] + eps, lab = "RMSE (log scale)",
           title = bquote("RMSE vs" ~ alpha ~ "(zoom," * alpha >= 0.05 * ")" * "\n" *
                          "AR(1)," ~ T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)))
    )) {
      plot(alpha_zoom, yval$y, type = "l", log = "y", lwd = 2, col = "blue",
           xlab = expression(alpha), ylab = yval$lab,
           xlim = c(0.05, max(alpha_zoom)), xaxs = "i", yaxt = "n",
           main = yval$title)
      grid(col = "grey90", lty = "dotted")
      yt <- axTicks(2); axis(2, at = yt, labels = sprintf("%.5f", yt))
      points(1, tail(yval$y, 1), pch = 19, col = "purple")
      text(1, tail(yval$y, 1), "Whittle", pos = 3, cex = 0.7, xpd = NA)
      if (grepl("RMSE", yval$lab)) {
        abline(v = alpha_best, col = "red", lty = 2)
        text(alpha_best, min(yval$y, na.rm = TRUE),
             labels = bquote(alpha["best"] == .(alpha_best)),
             pos = 4, cex = 0.7)
      }
    }

    ## ---- Boxplots ----------------------------------------------------------
    lab_expr <- eval(bquote(expression(
      Whittle, FDEL, Hybrid ~ alpha == .(round(alpha_best, 2)))))
    boxplot(list(Whittle = whittle, FDEL = fdel, Hybrid = hyb_best),
            main = bquote("Estimators for AR(1)" * "\n" *
                          T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)),
            ylab = expression(hat(phi)),
            col  = c("purple", "darkgreen", "blue"),
            names = rep("", 3), xaxt = "n")
    abline(h = phi_true, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
    axis(1, at = 1:3, labels = lab_expr, tick = FALSE)

    ## ---- RMSE barplot ------------------------------------------------------
    rmse_vec <- c(Whittle = rmse(whittle, phi_true),
                  FDEL    = rmse(fdel,    phi_true),
                  Hybrid  = rmse(hyb_best, phi_true))
    bp <- barplot(rmse_vec,
                  main = bquote("RMSE comparison for AR(1)" * "\n" *
                                T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)),
                  ylab = "RMSE", ylim = c(0, max(rmse_vec) * 1.25),
                  col = c("purple", "darkgreen", "blue"),
                  names.arg = rep("", 3), xaxt = "n")
    text(bp, rmse_vec, labels = round(rmse_vec, 4), pos = 3, cex = 0.8)
    axis(1, at = bp, labels = lab_expr, tick = FALSE)

  }
}
```

## Dominance diagnostics (AR(1), last configuration in memory)

```{r dominance}
## Uses the last res / hybrid_mat / whittle / fdel from the loop above.
## These are the Exp(1), n=300 results for the final iteration.
## For a specific case, reload: res <- results_all[["exp1"]][["50"]]

med_h <- apply(hybrid_mat, 2, median, na.rm = TRUE)
med_w <- median(whittle, na.rm = TRUE)
med_f <- median(fdel,    na.rm = TRUE)

eps_d <- 1e-10
ratio <- (abs(med_h - med_w) + eps_d) / (abs(med_h - med_f) + eps_d)

par(mar = c(4.8, 5.2, 4.2, 1.0) + 0.1)
plot(alpha_grid, ratio, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "black", log = "y",
     xaxs = "i", xlab = expression(alpha),
     ylab = expression(frac(d[W](alpha), d[F](alpha)) ~ "(log scale)"),
     main = "Relative proximity of the hybrid estimator")
grid(col = "grey90", lty = "dotted")
abline(h = 1, lty = 2, col = "grey40")
legend("topright",
       legend = c(expression(d[W](alpha)/d[F](alpha)), "Equal distance (ratio = 1)"),
       lty = c(1, 2), lwd = c(2, 1.5), col = c("black", "grey40"), bty = "n")

## Effective Whittle weight
den   <- med_w - med_f
w_eff <- if (abs(den) < 1e-12) rep(NA_real_, length(alpha_grid)) else
           pmin(pmax((med_h - med_f) / den, 0), 1)

par(mar = c(4.8, 5.2, 4.2, 1.0) + 0.1)
plot(alpha_grid, w_eff, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "blue",
     xaxs = "i", ylim = c(0, 1), xlab = expression(alpha),
     ylab = expression("Effective Whittle weight" * w[eff](alpha)),
     main = "Effective contribution of the Whittle component")
grid(col = "grey90", lty = "dotted")
lines(alpha_grid, alpha_grid, lty = 2, lwd = 1.5, col = "grey40")
legend("topleft",
       legend = c(expression(w[eff](alpha)),
                  expression("Linear reference:" * w[eff](alpha) == alpha)),
       col = c("blue", "grey40"), lty = c(1, 2), lwd = c(2, 1.5), bty = "n")
```

## Summary tables

```{r table}
big_table_ar1 <- make_big_table_ar1(results_all, phi_true = phi_true)
print(big_table_ar1)
```

```{r latex, results='asis'}
to_latex_table_ar1(
  big_table_ar1,
  caption = "Bias, SD and RMSE of Whittle, FDEL and Hybrid estimators for AR(1) with $\\phi_0 = 0.4$ under different innovations."
)
```
